title: flipWings
description: This MOD has 3 items Prepare different items for the right and left. If the player places the left wing in his left arm and holds the right wing in his right hand, he will spread both wings.
body: If you wave your dominant hand (right click) while there is a player motion, it will float up. Another feature is that while both wings are spread, it is difficult to accelerate and can move horizontally at high speed. When ascending, horizontal energy is converted to vertical energy, so Movement speed becomes slower. Of course, you cannot use other items while flying. The remaining items are bonus elements. You can use cobblestones obtained in the early stages of survival as bullets for long-range attacks.
